title: Saudi-UAE secret strikes inside Iran — May 14 2026
narrative: NYT (May 14, 2026) — "Saudi Arabia and U.A.E. Carried Out Secret Attacks in Iran, U.S. Officials Say." The Gulf Arab states have been "grappling with how to deter Iran" as American security guarantees are seen as insufficient. Anonymous US officials confirmed the attacks. No US direct involvement claimed publicly. Iran war powers vote simultaneously failing in Senate (May 13). Trump maintaining "maximum pressure" posture.
telemetry: Satellite imagery of reported strike sites inside Iran — check for blast craters, structural damage, fire damage in areas consistent with the NYT description
Flight tracking (ADS-B) for Saudi/UAE military aircraft near Iranian airspace on dates of reported attacks — were there any prohibited airspace violations?
IranAAF / Islamic Republic of Iran Air Defense social media and official statements — what did Iranian authorities officially acknowledge vs. what they claimed was "external aggression"?
US CENTCOM statements — any denial, confirmation, or deliberate ambiguity about US foreknowledge?
Oil price / commodities markets reaction on May 13-14 — did the "secret attacks" narrative move markets, suggesting prior knowledge?
Cyber telemetry: any correlation with previously reported Iranian infrastructure attacks that would suggest retaliation was planned
verdict: [SIPHONED VERDICT] Attacks confirmed by anonymous officials. No independent verification of targets, damage, or scale.
